# Controller Skin

A customizable, web-based gamepad overlay. It provides an intuitive drag-and-drop editor interface to build, restyle, and bind xinput into a unique visual output.

URL: <https://unbanrlkorea.github.io/controller-skin/?lang=en>

[Example 1 URL](https://unbanrlkorea.github.io/controller-skin/?lang=en&)
\- simple customization

[Example 2 URL](https://unbanrlkorea.github.io/controller-skin/?lang=en&)
\- advanced customization


## Features

* **Drag & Drop Editor**: Press `C` to access the editor panel. Drag individual visual objects directly on your screen to manually rearrange them using individual coordinate controls.
* **Layered Object Design**: Buttons are built in 3-layer sandwiches: Physical Body, Active Effect Glow, and Text Labels. You can customize transparency and replace colors or images for each layer independently.
* **Global & Per-Object Overrides**: Establish unified default design themes globally or assign distinct customized styles/images to individual specific buttons.
* **Persistent URL Configuration**: All settings, bindings, and custom skins are base64-encoded dynamically straight into your browser's URL. Share the URL or paste it directly as an OBS Browser Source (no back-end server or file storage required).
* **Modular Multi-Language Support (i18n)**: Out-of-the-box support for English (`?lang=en`) and Korean (`?lang=ko`). Built intentionally to allow anyone to drop in alternative translation bundles natively via a single configuration file.

## Project Structure

```text
controller-skin/
│
├── index.html          # Main application viewport and structured DOM canvas
│
├── css/
│   ├── style.css       # Layout styles for the settings panel, modal tabs, and alerts
│   └── gamepad.css     # Gamepad baseline designs and variable-driven layers
│
└── js/
    ├── i18n.js         # Localization mapping dictionary and translation engines
    ├── state.js        # Global appState structure, base64 URL serializers, and styles injector
    ├── editor.js       # Core editor functions, panel tab navigation, and drag-and-drop logic
    └── input.js        # HTML5 Gamepad API integration and high-refresh animation loop
